name: Water Tank Size Calculator
seo_description: Water Tank Size Calculator. Number of people, Litres per person/day, Days of autonomy — get Litres needed, Recommended tank, Daily consumption instantly.
example_label: Calculate water tank capacity for 4 people with 150L/day consumption and 3 days reserve.

range_hints.personas: Number of habitantes of la vivienda
range_hints.litros_persona_dia: Consumo típico: 100-200 L/persona/día according to hábitos
range_hints.dias_autonomia: Recomendado: 1-3 days according to frequency of suministro

result_context: To {personas} personas with {litros_persona_dia} L/day se need {consumo_diario} L/day. Con {dias_autonomia} days of autonomy: {capacidad_total} L of tank ({capacidad_m3} m³).
formula_display: Consumo_diario = personas × litros_persona_día; Capacidad = consumption × días_autonomía
steps: Calculate consumption diario: 4 personas × 150 L = 600 L/day
Consider volume muerto: agregar 10% = 1320 L (tank comercial: 1500 L)
mistakes: No Consider volume muerto of the tank (fund no utilizable)
Dimensionar without margin to visitas or consumption excepcional
No prever system of rebose and limpieza of the tank
description: Water tank sizing based on occupants, daily consumption and reserve days.
